CustomField.description: Optional override for the Campaign Member status that NPPatch assigns when automatically creating a Campaign Member from the Primary Contact and Primary Campaign Source. When blank, defaults to a responded status for Closed/Won or a non-responded status for other stages.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter a specific Campaign Member status to use when NPPatch links the Primary Contact to the Campaign. Leave blank to use the default (responded for Closed/Won, non-responded otherwise).
CustomField.label: Primary Contact Campaign Member Status
